# kUSBReEnumerateReleaseDeviceMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask to release the device.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBReEnumerateReleaseDeviceMask = ( 1 << kUSBReEnumerateReleaseDeviceBit)
```
